watchlist.topic: Potential for aerosol transmission of hantaviruses
watchlist.details: Epidemiological evidence suggests aerosol spread may be important for Andes virus transmission in certain environments, warranting further investigation and consideration in infection control.
Serologic evidence from northern Italy indicates hantaviruses circulate locally but are rarely diagnosed, suggesting a need for increased surveillance and awareness.

watchlist.topic: Role of wild rodents in PCV2 ecology
watchlist.details: Detection of PCV2 in wild rats in Malaysia suggests possible environmental circulation and zoonotic potential, meriting ongoing surveillance.
